item.title: Projecting LED Finger Light Toys Recalled Due to Risk of Serious Injury Death from Battery Ingestion; Violate Mandatory Standard for Toys; Sold on Amazon by POPOOO
item.company: Amazon.com from December 2024 through March 2026 for about $13.
item.brand: Amazon.com from December 2024 through March 2026 for about $13.
item.product: POPOOO Jungle Safari LED Finger Lights
item.summary: This recall involves POPOOO Jungle Safari LED Finger Lights. They were sold in sets of 24 multi-colored lights with white fingertip covers. Each finger light has three internal button cell batteries that power projections of the jungle safari characters when activated. "POPOOO" and "LED FINGER LIGHTS" are printed on the product's blue packaging.
item.affectedPeople: Consumers who purchased: POPOOO Jungle Safari LED Finger Lights.
item.remedy: Consumers should stop using the recalled finger lights immediately, take them away from children and contact POPOOO for a full refund. Consumers will be asked to remove and properly dispose of the finger lights into the trash and send a photo of the disposed product to bopoorecall@outlook.com. Note: Button cell batteries are hazardous. Batteries should be disposed of or recycled by following local hazardous waste procedures.
item.payoutAmount: Repair, refund, replacement, or other remedy if stated by the CPSC notice
